tips_en: I recommend starting with the RELEX paper, as its analysis of low-rank RLVR dynamics offers a foundational, compute-saving perspective on policy optimization that contextualizes the gated reinforcement learning stages in both IndusAgent and MEGA-ASR. Together, the three papers form a coherent thread on scalable reinforcement learning: RELEX efficiently extrapolates training trajectories, while the other two demonstrate domain-specific instantiations of gated policy optimization in industrial vision and robust speech recognition.
tips_zh: 建议首先阅读 RELEX，因为它对低秩 RLVR 动态的分析为高效策略优化提供了基础视角，有助于理解 IndusAgent 和 MEGA-ASR 中的门控强化学习阶段。三篇论文共同构成了可扩展强化学习的连贯脉络：RELEX 实现了训练轨迹的高效外推，而另两篇则分别在工业视觉和鲁棒语音识别中展示了门控策略优化的领域应用。
